creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Veniamin,

Thanks for your submission. I've added LICENSE information to your
port. Following are the two lines added to it:

#v+
LICENSE=	GPLv3
LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
#v-

Let me know if you approve the changes.

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA      | GPG: F682 CDCC 39DC 0FEA E116  20B6 C746 CFA9 E74F A4B0
freebsd.org!ashish | http://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/
